params.name: notation
params.description:
Specifies the notation of the transaction. Possible values are: - `notabene`: Uses Notabene notation (default behavior). - `fireblocks`: Uses Fireblocks notation, with automatic translation of asset tickers and amounts. - `<none>`: Defaults to `notabene` for backward compatibility.
**Note:** The default value for the `notation` parameter will change from `notabene` to `fireblocks` Update your integrations accordingly.

items.docs:
Validate Travel Rule transactions.
Checks what beneficiary VASP details are required by your jurisdiction and the beneficiary's jurisdiction.
**Deprecation Notice** This endpoint will be deprecated soon in favor of the [validate full](https://developers.fireblocks.com/reference/validatefulltravelruletransaction) endpoint. Please update your integrations to use the  [validate full](https://developers.fireblocks.com/reference/validatefulltravelruletransaction) endpoint to ensure compatibility with

params.name: notation
params.description:
Specifies the notation of the transaction. Possible values are
- `notabene`: Uses Notabene notation (default behavior).
- `fireblocks`: Uses Fireblocks notation, with automatic translation of asset tickers and amounts.
- `<none>`: Defaults to `notabene` for backward compatibility.

**Note:** The default value for the `notation` parameter will change from
`notabene` to `fireblocks` Update your integrations accordingly.

items.docs:
Validate Full Travel Rule transaction.
Checks for all required information on the originator and beneficiary VASPs.
Learn more about Fireblocks Travel Rule management in the following [guide](https://developers.fireblocks.com/docs/define-travel-rule-policies).

</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.

params.name: fields
params.description: CSV of fields to return (all, "blank" or see list of all field names below)

items.docs:
Get VASP Details.
Returns information about a VASP that has the specified DID.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.

params.name: fields
params.description: CSV of fields to return (all, "blank" or see list of all field names below)

params.name: reviewValue
params.description: Filter by the VASP's review status. Possible values include: "TRUSTED", "BLOCKED", "MANUAL", or "NULL". When provided, only VASPs that match the specified reviewValue will be returned (i.e., VASPs that have already been reviewed to this status).

items.docs:
Get All VASPs.
Returns a list of VASPs. VASPs can be searched and sorted and results are paginated.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.

Updates a VASP with the provided parameters. Use this endpoint to add your public jsonDIDkey generated by Notabene.
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin, Non-Signing Admin, Signer, Approver, Editor, Viewer.

params.name: vaultAccountId
params.description: The ID of the vault account

items.docs:
Get assigned VASP DID for a specific vault. 
Returns empty `vaspDid` string value in response if none assigned.

params.name: vaultAccountId
params.description: The ID of the vault account

items.docs:
Sets the VASP DID for a specific vault. 
Pass empty string to remove an existing one.

params.name: txId
params.description: The transaction id that was rejected by screening checks

items.docs:
This endpoint is restricted to Admin API users and is only applicable to outgoing transactions.
Calling the "Bypass Screening Policy" API endpoint triggers a new transaction, with the API user as the initiator, bypassing the screening policy check
</br>Endpoint Permission: Admin and Non-Signing Admin.

params.name: txId
params.description: Fireblocks transaction ID of the screened transaction

items.docs:
Provides all the compliance details for the given screened transaction.
</br>Endpoint Permission: All users.

info.name: Set AML verdict for Manual Screening Verdict

items.docs: Set AML verdict for incoming transactions when the Manual Screening Verdict feature is enabled.

**Note:** These endpoints are currently in beta and might be subject to changes.

info.name: Get the active policy and its validation by policy type

params.name: policyType
params.description: The policy type(s) to retrieve. Can be a single type or multiple types by repeating the parameter (e.g., ?policyType=TRANSFER&policyType=MINT).

items.docs:
**Note:** This endpoint is currently in beta and subject to change. If you want to participate in the Policies beta, contact your Fireblocks Customer Success Manager or send an email to csm@fireblocks.com.

Returns the active policy and its validation for a specific policy type.

**Endpoint Permissions:** Owner, Admin, Non-Signing Admin.
